input.user_input: Summarize the main protections under the Electronic Communications Privacy Act relevant to enterprise SaaS providers.

actual: The Electronic Communications Privacy Act (ECPA) of 1986 is a foundational U.S. federal law governing the interception of, and access to, electronic communications. For enterprise Software as a Service (SaaS) providers, ECPA is highly relevant
